task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo CRM interface shows the details view for the opportunity named 'CloudServices Partnership' (Vertex Solutions Corp).
The 'Schedule Activity' popup window or form is visible on the screen.
The 'Activity Type' field in the schedule activity dialog is set to 'Call' or 'Phone Call'.

task_completion.description: Set the due date to tomorrow
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Due Date' field is set to tomorrow's date. The VLM should check the OS system clock in the taskbar to determine today's date and verify the due date is exactly one day later.
The 'Summary' field contains the exact text 'Follow-up call regarding Q2 proposal'.

The activity is successfully scheduled and visible in the opportunity's chatter/log panel on the right side, showing the 'Call' icon, the summary 'Follow-up call regarding Q2 proposal', and the due date.

integrity.description: Agent used the Odoo web GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacted with the Odoo web interface in a browser, rather than using terminal commands, Python scripts, or API calls to create the activity.
There is no evidence of the browser's Developer Tools being used to alter the DOM to fake the activity creation.

integrity.description: Activity appears in genuine Odoo chatter
integrity.visual_evidence: The scheduled activity appears naturally integrated into the Odoo chatter panel with correct styling, icons, and layout.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target opportunity is 'CloudServices Partnership' for 'Vertex Solutions Corp'. The activity type must be 'Call' or 'Phone Call'. The summary must be exactly 'Follow-up call regarding Q2 proposal'. The due date must be tomorrow (verify against the system clock visible in the screenshots).
